source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4|seg.1.1.1.5|seg.1.1.1.6|seg.1.1.1.7
distilled_thesis: Once wisdom becomes overflow, it seeks recipients and cannot remain self-contained without betraying its own abundance.
